children.label: A
children.text: comparable to those provided by the Secretary of State to members of the Foreign Service under chapter 9 of title I of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 (, et seq.) or any other provision of law; orPublic Law 96–46522 U.S.C. 4081

children.label: B
children.text: comparable to those provided by the Director of Central Intelligence to personnel of the Central Intelligence Agency; and
